bugs_found.title: Z-score tidak muncul di TumbuhKembangPage chart
bugs_found.detail: grafikData maps record.zScoreBbU ?? null — but API returns zScore not zScoreBbU → all null → chart empty

bugs_found.title: Data terbalik — terbaru harusnya di atas
bugs_found.detail: getRiwayatForCitizen: select missing tanggalPemeriksaan, zScoreTbU, zScoreBbTb; mapped return only has id/createdAt/beratBadan/tinggiBadan/zScore/statusGizi; tanggalPemeriksaan not passed through so TumbuhKembangPage falls back to createdAt (seed date) for all records
bugs_found.fix: Add tanggalPemeriksaan, zScoreTbU, zScoreBbTb to select + return mapping

bugs_found.title: Meja 3/4/5 skip daftar balita — langsung ke input
bugs_found.detail: All three pages initialize selectedBalitaId from routerState?.balitaId ?? activeBalitaId ?? null — pre-selects from store and skips Step 1 (balita picker)
bugs_found.fix: Change initial state to null always in all three pages

bugs_found.title: Meja 4 setelah simpan tidak kembali ke daftar anak
bugs_found.detail: onSuccess of save catatan only shows toast, does not setSelectedBalitaId(null) → stays in Step 2 (input view) after save
bugs_found.fix: Add setSelectedBalitaId(null) in save catatan onSuccess callback

bugs_found.title: AI Early Warning gagal generate
bugs_found.detail: EarlyWarningRequestSchema = z.object({ pemeriksaanId: z.string().uuid() }) — required UUID. Meja4 sends pemeriksaanId: selectedPemeriksaanId which can be null (when kader navigates to Meja4 directly without coming from Meja2) → 400 error
bugs_found.fix: Option A: make pemeriksaanId optional in schema + auto-fetch latest pemeriksaan for balita in handler. Option B: Meja4 auto-fetch latest pemeriksaanId when balita is selected (useQuery). Prefer Option A.

bugs_found.title: Kader dashboard aktif dilayani dan sisa antrian tampilkan '--'
bugs_found.detail: Lines 234-239 hardcode 'Aktif Dilayani' value as literal '--' and 'Sisa Antrian' as literal '--'. AntrianAktif interface has no nomorAktif or sisaAntrian fields.
bugs_found.fix: Add nomorAktif + sisaAntrian to AntrianAktif interface + /antrian/saya backend response

bugs_found.title: Estimasi waktu dilayani tidak berkurang meski posisi dipanggil
bugs_found.detail: computeCountdown called with nomorAktif: 0 hardcoded → estimasi never changes regardless of real queue position. AntrianAktif.nomorAktif not available.
bugs_found.fix: Backend /antrian/saya must include nomorAktif in response; frontend use real value

bugs_found.title: Family account belum ada
bugs_found.detail: Family account feature not implemented. Large feature — needs separate session planning.
